name: nanmesh-catalog
description: Gives Claude access to the NaN Mesh AI-native product catalog. Search products, get AI-optimized Agent Cards, get ranked recommendations, and submit feedback — all from natural language.

NANMESH_API_URL.description: Base URL of the NaN Mesh backend API

NANMESH_API_KEY.description: Optional X-API-Key for write operations (feedback submission)

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search the NaN Mesh product catalog by keyword. Returns AI summaries, pricing, and confidence scores.

tools.name: get_agent_card
tools.description: Fetch the full AI-optimized Agent Card for a product — includes recommended_for, pricing plans, key features, trust signals.

tools.name: recommend_products
tools.description: Get AI-ranked product recommendations with explanation for each result. Better than raw search for answering 'what should I use for X'.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List all catalog products, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: List available product categories with counts.

tools.name: get_products_changed_since
tools.description: Get products updated after a timestamp — for cache sync.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit a rating and review for a product. Improves trust score and recommendation ranking.
